The product is B2B workflow automation platform. The market is Mid-market SaaS operations teams.

This message is for a GB launch across United Kingdom and Ireland. Industries include Software and Professional services. Company size is 1000+.

Titles include Revenue Operations Manager and Marketing Operations Director; functions include Marketing, Sales, and Operations; seniorities are Director and VP.
Keywords include workflow automation and revenue operations. Pains include manual handoffs and slow lead follow-up. Triggers include CRM migration and pipeline conversion pressure.

The campaign goal is Trial demand. Preferred channels include linkedin-ads, microsoft-ads, and google-ads-youtube.
